title: AutoMine Solution for AV2 2026 Scenario Mining Challenge
authors: Songliang Cao, Jiele Zhao, Yuru Wang, Hao Li, Daqi Liu, Zehan Zhang, Fangzhen Li, Yu Wang, Yue Zhang, Bing Wang, Guang Chen, Hao Lu, Hangjun Ye
abstract: With the development of autonomous driving systems, mining high-value, safety-critical, and planning-relevant scenarios from large-scale driving logs has become essential for data-driven evaluation. In this paper, we propose AutoMine, a robust self-refining scenario mining method based on LLMs and VLMs. AutoMine uses semantics-preserving prompt augmentation to reduce LLM prompt sensitivity, combines robust trajectory atomic functions with VLM-based functions to handle perception noise and open-world visual cues, and refines generated code through execution feedback from real logs. In the Argoverse 2 Scenario Mining Competition at CVPR 2026, AutoMine achieves a HOTA-Temporal score of 36.38 and a Timestamp BA score of 77.21.
title_zh: 面向AV2 2026场景挖掘挑战赛的AutoMine解决方案
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶系统的发展，从大规模驾驶日志中挖掘高价值、安全关键且与规划相关的场景已成为数据驱动评估的核心需求。本文提出AutoMine——一种基于大语言模型（LLMs）与视觉语言模型（VLMs）的鲁棒自优化场景挖掘方法。该方法通过语义保持的提示增强技术降低LLM提示敏感性，结合鲁棒轨迹原子函数与基于VLM的函数以应对感知噪声与开放世界视觉线索，并利用真实日志的执行反馈对生成代码进行迭代优化。在CVPR 2026 Argoverse 2场景挖掘竞赛中，AutoMine取得了HOTA-Temporal分数36.38与时间戳BA分数77.21的成绩。

title: Understanding and Detecting Scalability Faults in Large-Scale Distributed Systems
authors: Hao-Nan Zhu, Goodness Ayinmode, Cesar A. Stuardo, Haryadi S. Gunawi, Cindy Rubio-González
abstract: Scalable distributed systems form the backbone of modern computing infrastructure. However, as scale grows, system complexity may lead to scalability faults. Scalability faults are challenging to uncover and diagnose, as they are often latent and only manifest at large-scale deployment. In this paper, we present the first comprehensive study on scalability faults and propose an approach for their detection. First, we systematically investigate 444 scalability issue reports from 10 large-scale distributed systems to understand the common anti-patterns and root causes of scalability faults. We found that the majority of these faults are caused by the synergy between dimensional code fragments and anti-patterns associated with them. Second, based on our findings, we design and implement ScaleLens, a novel approach to detect scalability faults. ScaleLens combines dynamic and static analyses to pinpoint dimensional code fragments and match them with anti-patterns. Our evaluation shows that ScaleLens detects 4.2x more dimensional code fragments associated with known scalability faults compared to the baseline. On the latest stable versions of Cassandra, HDFS, and Ignite, ScaleLens detects 334 dimensional code fragments with confirmed problematic behavior.
title_zh: 大规模分布式系统中可扩展性故障的理解与检测
abstract_zh: 可扩展的分布式系统构成了现代计算基础设施的支柱。然而，随着规模的增长，系统复杂性可能导致可扩展性缺陷。这些缺陷通常具有潜伏性，仅在大型部署中才会显现，因此难以发现和诊断。本文首次对可扩展性缺陷进行了全面研究，并提出了一种检测方法。首先，我们系统地调查了来自10个大规模分布式系统的444份可扩展性问题报告，以了解可扩展性缺陷的常见反模式及其根本原因。我们发现，这些缺陷大多由维度代码片段及其关联的反模式之间的协同作用引起。其次，基于研究发现，我们设计并实现了ScaleLens，一种检测可扩展性缺陷的新方法。ScaleLens结合动态与静态分析，精确定位维度代码片段并将其与反模式进行匹配。评估结果显示，与基线方法相比，ScaleLens检测到的与已知可扩展性缺陷相关的维度代码片段数量是基线方法的4.2倍。在Cassandra、HDFS和Ignite的最新稳定版本中，ScaleLens检测到334个被确认存在问题的维度代码片段。

title: Acoda: Adversarial Code Obfuscation for Defending against LLM-based Analysis
authors: Hongzhou Rao, Zikan Dong, Yanjie Zhao, Haodong Li, Haoyu Wang
abstract: With the widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) in software engineering (SE) tasks such as code understanding, debugging, and vulnerability detection, their powerful semantic reasoning ability has also introduced new security and privacy risks. LLMs can analyze, reconstruct, or even reverse-engineer source code logic, potentially leading to the leakage of intellectual property. To address this issue, we propose Acoda, a genetic algorithm-based adversarial code obfuscation framework that defends against LLM-based code analysis. Acoda leverages two key mechanisms of LLMs, namely safety alignment and token-based information processing, to design 8 semantics-preserving obfuscation methods. It iteratively optimizes obfuscation strategies through a genetic algorithm to generate adversarial samples that maximize defensive effectiveness. In addition, we propose a quantitative evaluation framework based on LLM responses, which combines an auxiliary LLM and four evaluation metrics to assess how target LLMs analyze obfuscated code comprehensively. Experimental results show that Acoda can effectively induce LLMs to refuse or misinterpret code analysis. On 7 state-of-the-art LLMs, including GPT-4o, DeepSeek, Qwen, Llama, and Gemma, Acoda achieves an attack success rate (ASR) of up to 70%, with strong cross-model transferability and minimal runtime overhead, while ensuring that the semantics of the original code remain unchanged. Overall, this study provides a new perspective for code protection and LLM security defense in the era of LLMs.
title_zh: Acoda：对抗性代码混淆以防御基于LLM的分析
abstract_zh: 随着大语言模型（LLMs）在软件工程（SE）任务（如代码理解、调试和漏洞检测）中的广泛应用，其强大的语义推理能力也带来了新的安全与隐私风险。LLMs能够分析、重构甚至逆向工程源代码逻辑，可能导致知识产权泄露。针对这一问题，我们提出Acoda——一种基于遗传算法的对抗性代码混淆框架，用于防御基于LLM的代码分析。Acoda利用LLM的两项关键机制（即安全对齐和基于令牌的信息处理），设计了8种保持语义的混淆方法，并通过遗传算法迭代优化混淆策略，生成最大化防御效果的对抗样本。此外，我们提出了一种基于LLM响应的定量评估框架，结合辅助LLM和四个评估指标，全面评估目标LLM对混淆代码的分析能力。实验结果表明，Acoda能有效诱导LLMs拒绝或误解代码分析。在包括GPT-4o、DeepSeek、Qwen、Llama和Gemma在内的7个最先进的LLMs上，Acoda实现了高达70%的攻击成功率（ASR），具有强跨模型迁移性和极低的运行开销，同时确保原始代码语义保持不变。总体而言，本研究为LLM时代的代码保护与LLM安全防御提供了新视角。

title: Can Open-Source LLM Agents Replace Static Application Security Testing Tools? An Empirical Assessment
authors: Derek Yohn, Luke Flancher, Mirajul Islam, Khaled Slhoub
abstract: This paper explores the value of agentic AI tools for cybersecurity purposes. We evaluate the efficacy of a general-purpose GenAI Large Language Model- (GenAI-) based agent when powered by three different Ollama-hosted general-purpose open source models. We assess each agent's performance using precision, recall, false positive count, and a calculated composite score based upon the interplay of the captured metrics, against the baseline performance of an existing, vetted Static Application Security Testing (SAST) tool, Bandit. Our findings refute the notion that a modern open-source GenAI LLM-based agent is currently suitable for the specialized task of SAST scanning under realistic conditions.
title_zh: 开源LLM代理能否取代静态应用安全测试工具？一项实证评估
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了智能体AI工具在网络安全领域的应用价值。我们评估了一款基于通用生成式AI大型语言模型（GenAI）的智能体，该智能体由三个通过Ollama托管的通用开源模型驱动。我们以精确率、召回率、误报数以及基于捕获指标交互计算得出的综合得分为评估指标，将每个智能体的性能与现有经过验证的静态应用安全测试（SAST）工具Bandit的基线性能进行对比。研究结果驳斥了以下观点：即当前现代开源GenAI大语言模型智能体在现实条件下适用于SAST扫描这一专业任务。

title: Runtime Skill Audit: Targeted Runtime Probing for Agent Skill Security
authors: Tu Lan, Chaowei Xiao
abstract: Agent skills let LLM agents reuse instructions, resources, tools, and workflows, but they also create a new place for malicious behavior to hide. A skill may look benign in its documentation or code while becoming harmful only when it is invoked with particular user requests, local assets, persistent state, or multi-step tool interactions. This makes purely static vetting brittle. We present Runtime Skill Audit (RSA), a dynamic analysis method that audits skills by asking what the skill-mediated agent actually does under targeted runtime conditions. Instead of testing every skill with the same generic tasks, RSA profiles risk-relevant interfaces, prepares the execution context needed to exercise them, and assigns security labels from the resulting trace evidence. We instantiate RSA on OpenClaw and evaluate it on 100 skills against representative static baselines. RSA achieves 90.0\% accuracy with an 88.0\% true positive rate and an 8.0\% false positive rate, improving accuracy by 13.0 percentage points over the best static baseline. Under self-evolving attacks, static detectors collapse after one or two rounds, while RSA continues to detect 19--20 out of 20 malicious skills across rounds.
title_zh: 运行时技能审计：针对智能体技能安全的目标化运行时探测
abstract_zh: Agent技能使大型语言模型代理能够复用指令、资源、工具和工作流程，但也为恶意行为提供了新的藏身之处。一项技能在文档或其代码中可能看似无害，但只有在特定用户请求、本地资产、持久状态或多步骤工具交互下被调用时才会变得有害。这使得纯粹的静态审查变得脆弱。我们提出运行时技能审计（RSA），一种动态分析方法，通过询问技能中介代理在目标运行时条件下实际执行的操作来审计技能。RSA并非使用相同的通用任务测试每项技能，而是对风险相关的接口进行特征分析，准备执行这些接口所需的上下文环境，并根据生成的追踪证据分配安全标签。我们在OpenClaw上实现了RSA，并使用100项技能与代表性的静态基线进行评估。RSA达到了90.0%的准确率，88.0%的真阳性率和8.0%的假阳性率，相比最佳静态基线准确率提高了13.0个百分点。在面对自我进化攻击时，静态检测器在一轮或两轮后即失效，而RSA在每轮中仍能持续检测出20项恶意技能中的19至20项。

title: Undefined Behavior in C and C++: An Experiment With Desktop Use Cases
authors: Jukka Ruohonen, Krzysztof Sierszecki
abstract: Undefined behavior is idiomatic to C and C++ programming; such behavior is a use of an erroneous program construct for which the languages impose no requirements, such as integer overflows. The paper presents an empirical experiment seeking to probe the extent of undefined behavior executing underneath typical desktop use of a Linux distribution. The analysis is based on an undefined behavior sanitizer implemented in a compiler. According to the results, undefined behavior is common. By completing 59 simple experimental tasks, nearly 11 thousand unique undefined behavior warnings were generated by 32 unique programs and libraries written in C or C++. Of these warnings, most were associated with the Mesa graphics library and generated by interacting with graphical user interfaces. Merely logging into the GNOME desktop environment generated over 500 unique warnings. Of all warnings, the clear majority was about virtual table pointers. The associated stack traces were also lengthy in general. With these and other results, the paper contributes to the empirical literature on C and C++.
title_zh: C和C++中的未定义行为：桌面用例实验
abstract_zh: 未定义行为是C和C++编程中的惯用法；这种行为是对错误程序结构的使用，而语言对此类结构无任何要求，例如整数溢出。本文展示了一项实证实验，旨在探究Linux发行版典型桌面使用环境下未定义行为的执行程度。分析基于编译器中实现的未定义行为检测器。根据结果，未定义行为十分常见。通过完成59个简单的实验任务，由32个用C或C++编写的独特程序和库生成了近11,000条独特的未定义行为警告。其中，大部分警告与Mesa图形库相关，并通过与图形用户界面的交互产生。仅登录GNOME桌面环境就生成了超过500条独特警告。在所有警告中，绝大多数涉及虚表指针。相关的堆栈跟踪通常也较长。通过这些及其他结果，本文为关于C和C++的实证研究文献做出了贡献。

title: SkillJuror: Measuring How Agent Skill Organization Changes Runtime Behavior
authors: Zhiyu Chen, Zihan Guo, Bo Huang, Bingwei Lu, Jianghao Lin, Yuanjian Zhou, Weinan Zhang
abstract: Agent Skills augment large language model (LLM) agents with procedural knowledge at inference time, but current benchmarks rarely distinguish what a Skill says from how it is organized. We study this distinction through Progressive Disclosure, where a concise root file points agents to supporting resources on demand, and compare it with a normalized flat baseline. We present SkillJuror, a framework for evaluating Skill writing paradigms through semantically controlled variants, matched multi-trial evaluations, and trajectory evidence while holding task knowledge fixed. In an 82-task SkillsBench study, Progressive Disclosure changes runtime behavior before aggregate outcomes: distinct Skill resources touched per trajectory rise from 1.18 to 3.85, and effective uptake events rise from 1.33 to 3.92. It also yields 17 additional verifier-passing trials out of 410 matched trials (+4.1%) over the normalized flat baseline. The benefit is task-dependent. Progressive Disclosure helps when supporting resources guide implementation, checking, or repair, but is weaker when success hinges on exact output conventions, numerical thresholds, or long artifact-generation pipelines. These results show that Skill organization is not mere presentation: it can change how agents search and apply procedural knowledge, while outcome gains depend on whether the exposed resources are actionable for the task. Code is available at https://github.com/zhiyuchen-ai/skill-juror.
title_zh: SkillJuror：衡量智能体技能组织如何改变运行时行为
abstract_zh: 代理技能在推理时为大语言模型（LLM）代理补充程序性知识，但当前基准测试很少区分技能内容与其组织方式。我们通过渐进式披露（Progressive Disclosure）研究这一区别——使用简洁的根文件引导代理按需访问支持资源，并将其与规范化的扁平基线进行比较。我们提出SkillJuror框架，通过语义受控变体、匹配的多轮评估以及轨迹证据来评估技能编写范式，同时保持任务知识固定。在包含82个任务的技能基准研究（SkillsBench）中，渐进式披露在汇总结果前即改变了运行时行为：每个轨迹中涉及的不同技能资源从1.18增加到3.85，有效采纳事件从1.33增加到3.92。此外，在410个匹配试验中，与规范化扁平基线相比，它额外产生了17个通过验证器的试验（+4.1%）。该收益取决于任务类型。当支持资源指导实现、检查或修复时，渐进式披露有所帮助；但当任务成败取决于精确输出规范、数值阈值或长篇幅工件生成流程时，其效果较弱。这些结果表明，技能组织并非仅关乎呈现形式：它能改变代理搜索和应用程序性知识的方式，而结果收益则取决于暴露的资源是否对任务可操作。代码见 https://github.com/zhiyuchen-ai/skill-juror。

title: MoCA-Agent: A Market-of-Claims Code Agent for Financial and Numerical Reasoning
authors: Abdelrahman Abdallah, AbdelRahim A. Elmadany, Sameh Al Natour, Hasan Cavusoglu, Adam Jatowt, Muhammad Abdul-Mageed
abstract: Financial and tabular question answering requires more than fluent reasoning: answers must be grounded in the exact facts, formulas, units, signs, and scales that support them. A single misread cell or incorrect operation can silently produce a plausible but wrong result. We introduce \textsc{MOCA-Agent}, a market-of-claims code agent that replaces free-form multi-agent debate with claim-level verification. The system decomposes each question into typed atomic claims, asks specialist trader agents to buy or sell those claims, clears their orders into confidence-weighted accept/reject decisions, and synthesizes an executable Python program from market-supported evidence. A code-aware verifier then checks the program for execution, structural consistency, and common financial reasoning errors, with at most one market-aware repair round. Across ten public benchmarks spanning financial numerical reasoning, general tabular reasoning, ESG question answering, and multimodal chart reasoning, \textsc{MOCA-Agent} achieves strong performance using a fixed Qwen3.6-27B backbone, including $78.3\%$ on FinQA, $76.0\%$ on FinanceMath, $71.2\%$ on MultiHiertt, $86.9\%$ on ESGenius, and $85.6\%$ average on FinChart-Bench. These results show that aggregating evidence at the level of atomic claims, rather than whole answers, improves robustness in high-stakes numerical reasoning.\footnote{The code and data are available: https://github.com/UBC-NLP/MoCA-Agent.
title_zh: MoCA-Agent：一种面向金融与数值推理的声明市场代码智能体
abstract_zh: 金融与表格型问答需要的不只是流畅的推理：答案必须严格依据支持它们的确切事实、公式、单位、符号和尺度。单个单元格的误读或错误的运算都可能悄无声息地生成一个看似合理却错误的结果。我们提出 \textsc{MOCA-Agent}，一种基于声明市场的代码代理，它用声明级别的验证取代了自由形式的多智能体辩论。该系统将每个问题分解为类型化的原子声明，安排专业交易代理买入或卖出这些声明，将其订单清算为基于置信度的接受/拒绝决策，并从市场支持的证据中综合生成可执行的 Python 程序。随后，一个对代码敏感的验证器检查程序的执行情况、结构一致性以及常见的金融推理错误，最多进行一次市场感知的修复轮次。在涵盖金融数值推理、通用表格推理、ESG 问题解答和多模态图表推理的十个公开基准测试中，\textsc{MOCA-Agent} 使用固定的 Qwen3.6-27B 骨干网络取得了强劲表现，包括在 FinQA 上达到 $78.3\%$，FinanceMath 上 $76.0\%$，MultiHiertt 上 $71.2\%$，ESGenius 上 $86.9\%$，以及 FinChart-Bench 上平均 $85.6\%$。这些结果表明，在原子声明层面聚合证据（而非整体答案）能够提升高风险数值推理的鲁棒性。\footnote{代码和数据已公开：https://github.com/UBC-NLP/MoCA-Agent。}

title: Breaking Entropy Bounds: Accelerating RL Training via MTP with Rejection Sampling
authors: Yucheng Li, Huiqiang Jiang, Yang Xu, Jianxin Yang, Yi Zhang, Yizhong Cao, Yuhao Shen, Fan Zhou, Rui Men, Jianwei Zhang, An Yang, Bowen Yu, Bo Zheng, Fei Huang, Junyang Lin, Dayiheng Liu, Jingren Zhou
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a key component in modern large language models, yet the rollout stage remains the key bottleneck in RL training pipelines. Although Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) offers a natural solution to accelerate rollouts through speculative decoding, many studies have observed that MTP acceptance rates degrade significantly during RL training, leading to limited speedup performance. To address this bottleneck, we present Bebop, a systematic study of MTP in LLM post-training, and offer practical recipes to integrate MTP into large-scale RL pipelines. First, we reveal that the MTP acceptance rate is fundamentally bounded by the fluctuation of model entropy, which demonstrates a clear negative linear relationship with the rise of entropy in the RL stage. Second, we show that probabilistic rejection sampling largely alleviates the disturbance introduced by entropy in RL compared to greedy draft sampling. We further identify that the conventional MTP training objectives (cross-entropy or KL) are suboptimal in such settings, and therefore we propose a novel end-to-end TV loss that directly optimizes multi-step rejection sampling acceptance rate, yielding ~10% acceptance rate improvements, achieving up to 95% acceptance rates and up to 25% extra inference throughput gains across mathematical reasoning, code generation, and agentic tasks. Third, we test various online MTP training strategies during RL and show that pre-RL MTP training with e2e TV loss and rejection sampling achieves a consistent acceptance rate and speedup throughout the entire RL, eliminating the need for costly online MTP updating. We provide extensive experiments and analysis that validate our findings. Experimental results show our method achieves up to 1.8x end-to-end acceleration in async RL training of Qwen3.5, Qwen3.6, and Qwen3.7 models.
title_zh: 突破熵界：利用带有拒绝采样的MTP加速强化学习训练
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）已成为现代大型语言模型的关键组成部分，但在RL训练流程中，展开阶段仍然是主要的性能瓶颈。尽管多令牌预测（MTP）通过推测性解码为加速展开提供了自然解决方案，但许多研究发现，在RL训练过程中，MTP的接受率显著下降，导致加速效果有限。为解决这一瓶颈，我们提出了Bebop——一项针对LLM后训练中MTP的系统研究，并提供了将MTP融入大规模RL管线的实用方法。首先，我们揭示了MTP接受率本质上受到模型熵波动的限制，且与RL阶段熵的上升呈现明显的负线性关系。其次，我们证明，与贪婪草稿采样相比，概率拒绝采样在很大程度上减轻了RL中熵引入的干扰。此外，我们识别出传统的MTP训练目标（交叉熵或KL散度）在此类设置中并非最优，因此提出了一种新型端到端总变差损失，该损失直接优化多步拒绝采样的接受率，实现了约10%的接受率提升，在数学推理、代码生成和智能体任务中达到高达95%的接受率，并获得最多25%的额外推理吞吐量增益。第三，我们在RL过程中测试了多种在线MTP训练策略，并表明采用端到端总变差损失和拒绝采样的预RL MTP训练在整个RL过程中能保持一致的接受率和加速效果，从而消除了昂贵在线MTP更新的需求。我们通过大量实验和分析验证了这些发现。实验结果表明，我们的方法在Qwen3.5、Qwen3.6和Qwen3.7模型的异步RL训练中实现了高达1.8倍的端到端加速。

title: Claw-SWE-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating OpenClaw-style Agent Harnesses on Coding Tasks
authors: Mengyu Zheng, Kai Han, Boxun Li, Haiyang Xu, Yuchuan Tian, Wei He, Hang Zhou, Jianyuan Guo, Hailin Hu, Lin Ma, Chao Xu, Guohao Dai, Lixue Xia, Yunchao Wei, Yunhe Wang, Yu Wang
abstract: General-purpose agents such as OpenClaw are increasingly used as autonomous tool users, but their coding ability is difficult to measure under SWE-bench: a generic agent does not by itself satisfy the clean Docker workspace, patch, and prediction contract required for scoring. We introduce Claw-SWE-Bench, a multilingual SWE-bench-style benchmark and adapter protocol that makes heterogeneous agent harnesses, or claws, comparable under fair settings including a fixed prompt, runtime budget, workspace contract, patch extraction procedure, and evaluator. The full benchmark contains 350 GitHub issue-resolution instances across 8 languages and 43 repositories, drawn from SWE-bench-Multilingual and SWE-bench-Verified-Mini after future-commit cleanup. We also release Claw-SWE-Bench Lite for faster validation, which is an 80-instance subset selected by a cost-aware, rank-aware procedure over 17 calibration columns. On the full benchmark, OpenClaw with a minimal direct-diff adapter scores only $19.1\%$ Pass@1, whereas the full adapter reaches $73.4\%$ with the same GLM 5.1 backbone, showing that adapter design is essential for enabling OpenClaw-style harnesses to perform coding tasks effectively. Across an OpenClaw $\times$ nine-model sweep and a five-claw $\times$ two-model sweep, model choice changes Pass@1 by $29.4$ pp and harness choice by $27.4$ pp under fixed models; systems with similar accuracy can differ substantially in total API cost. Claw-SWE-Bench therefore treats harness and cost accounting as first-class axes of SWE-style coding-agent evaluation, providing both a full benchmark and a low-cost reference set for reproducible comparison. The data is available at https://github.com/opensquilla/claw-swe-bench and https://huggingface.co/datasets/TokenRhythm/Claw-SWE-Bench.
title_zh: Claw-SWE-Bench：评估OpenClaw风格智能体框架在编程任务上的基准
abstract_zh: 诸如OpenClaw等通用型智能体正越来越多地被用作自主工具使用者，但其编码能力在SWE-bench框架下难以衡量：通用智能体本身并不满足评分所需的干净Docker工作区、补丁及预测约定。我们推出了Claw-SWE-Bench——一个多语言SWE-bench风格基准测试与适配器协议，使异构的智能体框架（即“爪”）可在固定提示、运行时预算、工作区约定、补丁提取流程及评估器等公平设置下进行对比。完整基准包含350个GitHub问题解决实例，涵盖8种语言和43个代码仓库，这些实例来自SWE-bench-Multilingual和SWE-bench-Verified-Mini（经未来提交清理后）。我们还发布了Claw-SWE-Bench Lite（80个实例子集），用于快速验证——该子集通过一种基于成本感知和排名感知的流程，从17个校准维度中筛选得出。在完整基准上，采用最小化直接差异适配器的OpenClaw仅获得19.1%的Pass@1分数，而在相同GLM 5.1骨干模型下，完整适配器达到73.4%，这表明适配器设计对于使OpenClaw类框架高效执行编码任务至关重要。在OpenClaw × 9个模型的扫描以及五爪 × 两个模型的扫描中，模型选择导致Pass@1变化29.4个百分点，固定模型下框架选择变化27.4个百分点；准确率相近的系统在总API成本上可能差异显著。因此，Claw-SWE-Bench将框架与成本核算作为SWE风格编码智能体评估的首要维度，既提供了完整基准，也提供了低成本参考集，以实现可复现比较。数据可访问https://github.com/opensquilla/claw-swe-bench 和 https://huggingface.co/datasets/TokenRhythm/Claw-SWE-Bench。

title: PROJECTMEM: A Local-First, Event-Sourced Memory and Judgment Layer for AI Coding Agents
authors: Ripon Chandra Malo, Tong Qiu
abstract: AI coding assistants now support a growing share of software work, from quick scripts to production applications. Yet these agents remain largely stateless: each new session re-reads project files, re-derives prior decisions, and - most costly - may repeat debugging attempts that already failed. Reconstructing this context can consume an estimated 5,000-20,000 tokens per session; the bottleneck is often not model capability but missing project memory. We present projectmem, an open-source, local-first memory and judgment layer for AI coding agents. projectmem records development as an append-only, plain-text event log of typed events - issues, attempts, fixes, decisions, and notes - and deterministically projects that log into compact, AI-readable summaries served through the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Beyond storage, projectmem adds a deterministic pre-action gate that warns an agent before it repeats a previously failed fix or edits a known-fragile file. We frame this as Memory-as-Governance: memory that does not merely answer the agent but acts on its next action. The system runs fully offline with no telemetry; its immutable log also serves as a provenance trail for reproducible, auditable AI-assisted development. projectmem ships as a three-dependency Python package (14 MCP tools, 19 CLI commands, 37 automated tests) and is evaluated through a two-month self-study across 10 projects comprising 207 logged events. Source code: https://github.com/riponcm/projectmem.
title_zh: PROJECTMEM：一个本地优先、事件溯源的记忆与判断层，用于AI编码智能体
abstract_zh: AI编程助手如今在软件开发中承担着越来越大的份额，从快速脚本到生产应用。然而，这些智能体在很大程度上仍是无状态的：每次新会话都会重新读取项目文件、重新推导之前的决策，而最昂贵的是，它们可能会重复尝试已经失败的调试。每个会话重建这类上下文估计会消耗5000到20000个token；瓶颈往往不在于模型能力，而在于缺少项目记忆。我们提出projectmem，这是一个面向AI编程智能体的开源、本地优先的记忆与判断层。projectmem将开发过程记录为仅追加的纯文本事件日志，包含类型化事件（问题、尝试、修复、决策和备注），并通过确定性的方式将日志投射为紧凑且AI可读的摘要，通过模型上下文协议（MCP）提供。除存储外，projectmem还增加了一个确定性的行动前门控，在智能体重复执行先前失败的修复或编辑已知脆弱文件之前发出警告。我们将其定义为"记忆即治理"：记忆不仅仅回答智能体的问题，而是对其下一步行动施加影响。该系统完全离线运行，无需遥测；其不可变日志还作为可追溯、可审计的AI辅助开发的可复现性追踪链。projectmem以仅含三个依赖项的Python包形式发布（14个MCP工具、19个CLI命令、37个自动化测试），并通过两个月内对10个项目的自学评估（共207条日志事件）进行验证。源代码：https://github.com/riponcm/projectmem。

title: CORE-Bench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Code Retrieval in the Era of Agentic Coding
authors: Fuwei Zhang, Yanzhao Zhang, Mingxin Li, Dingkun Long, Lexiang Hu, Pengjun Xie, Zhao Zhang, Fuzhen Zhuang
abstract: Code retrieval is becoming central to coding agents, but agentic coding requires more than matching a natural-language query to an isolated snippet. Given a user request, a coding agent needs to navigate a concrete repository state, locate relevant files and functions, gather supporting context, and filter similar in-repository distractors. Existing code retrieval benchmarks mainly evaluate docstring-to-function or snippet-level matching, thereby missing this requirement-driven repository search problem. To address this gap, we introduce CORE-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark for code retrieval in the era of agentic coding. CORE-Bench evaluates code retrieval ability at three levels: code understanding, issue-to-edit localization, and broader context retrieval. Built from curated code-search tasks and SWE-bench-series instances, CORE-Bench contains over 180K queries and 106K broader-context relevance labels. Experiments with representative embedding models show a sharp drop from traditional code search to code retrieval in agentic coding settings. Simple supervised fine-tuning of existing embedding models significantly improves performance in this setting, suggesting substantial room for further progress.
title_zh: CORE-Bench：面向智能体编程时代的代码检索综合基准
abstract_zh: 代码检索正逐渐成为编码智能体的核心能力，但智能体编码所需的不仅仅是简单地将自然语言查询与孤立代码片段相匹配。面对用户请求，一个编码智能体需要遍历具体的仓库状态，定位相关文件和函数，收集支撑性上下文，并过滤仓库内相似的干扰项。现有的代码检索基准主要评估文档字符串到函数或片段级别的匹配，从而忽略了这种基于需求的仓库搜索问题。为填补这一空白，我们引入了CORE-Bench，这是一个面向智能体编码时代的全面代码检索基准。CORE-Bench从三个层面评估代码检索能力：代码理解、问题到编辑的定位，以及更广泛的上下文检索。基于精心整理的代码搜索任务和SWE-bench系列实例，CORE-Bench包含超过18万条查询和10.6万个更广上下文的相关性标签。使用代表性嵌入模型进行的实验表明，从传统代码搜索到智能体编码环境下的代码检索，性能出现了急剧下降。对现有嵌入模型进行简单的监督微调可显著提升该场景下的性能，表明仍有较大的进步空间。

title: Enhancing LLM-Based Code Translation with Verified Multi-Semantic Representations
authors: Yufu Wang, He Jiang, Hao Lin, Peiyu Zou, Ang Jia, Xiaochen Li, Zhilei Ren
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown great promise for automated code translation, yet existing approaches often rely on token-level statistical patterns rather than sufficient understanding of program semantics. As a result, translated programs may still contain logical and semantic errors. Although high-quality semantic guidance, such as functional descriptions and test cases, can help mitigate these errors, such resources are often unavailable in real-world scenarios. This raises two key challenges: how to construct rich semantic information directly from source code, and how to ensure that such semantics are accurate and reliable enough to guide translation.To address these challenges, we propose Multisage, a multi-semantic augmentation and self-calibration framework for LLM-based code translation. Multisage consists of three modules. First, a semantic representation parsing module extracts structured base semantics from source code, including data-flow graphs, type constraints, and external API information. Second, a multi-semantic augmentation module builds on these representations to generate diverse augmented semantics, including code summaries, function-level test cases, and API-oriented descriptions and tests. Third, a semantic consistency calibration module uses semantics-preserving mutations and cross-semantic consistency verification to filter, calibrate, and refine the generated semantics.Experiments on the HumanEval-X code translation benchmark show that Multisage improves translation success rates by up to 2.22 times across diverse backbone models. It consistently outperforms vanilla prompting, instruction-tuned LLMs, and Chain-of-Thought reasoning, with the largest gains observed on smaller models. These results demonstrate that explicit semantic augmentation can substantially improve the reliability of LLM-based code translation.
title_zh: 通过验证的多语义表示增强基于大语言模型的代码翻译
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLMs）在自动化代码翻译方面展现出巨大潜力，然而现有方法往往依赖基于词元的统计模式，而非对程序语义的充分理解。因此，翻译后的程序仍可能包含逻辑错误和语义错误。尽管高质量的语义引导（如功能描述和测试用例）有助于缓解此类错误，但在实际场景中，这类资源往往不可获取。这引出了两个关键挑战：如何直接从源代码构建丰富的语义信息，以及如何确保这些语义足够准确可靠以指导翻译。

针对这些挑战，我们提出了Multisage——一种基于LLM的代码翻译的多语义增强与自校准框架。Multisage包含三个模块。首先，语义表示解析模块从源代码中提取结构化基础语义，包括数据流图、类型约束和外部API信息。其次，多语义增强模块基于这些表示生成多样化的增强语义，包括代码摘要、函数级测试用例以及面向API的描述与测试。最后，语义一致性校准模块通过保持语义的变异和跨语义一致性验证，来过滤、校准和优化生成的语义。

在HumanEval-X代码翻译基准上的实验表明，Multisage在多种骨干模型上将翻译成功率最高提升了2.22倍。它始终优于原始提示、指令微调LLM和思维链推理，并且在较小模型上获得了最大增益。这些结果证明，显式的语义增强可以显著提升基于LLM的代码翻译的可靠性。

title: Grammar-Constrained Decoding Can Jailbreak LLMs into Generating Malicious Code
authors: Yitong Zhang, Shiteng Lu, Jia Li
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for code generation, raising concerns that they may be misused to produce malicious code. Meanwhile, Grammar-Constrained Decoding (GCD) has been widely adopted to improve the reliability of LLM-generated code by enforcing syntactic validity. In this paper, we reveal a counterintuitive risk: this reliability-oriented technique can itself become an attack surface. We uncover a new jailbreak attack, termed CodeSpear, that exploits GCD to induce LLMs into generating malicious code. Our experiments show that simply applying a benign code grammar constraint can effectively jailbreak LLMs. To address this vulnerability, we propose CodeShield, a safety alignment approach that robustly preserves safe behavior even under attacker-controlled grammar constraints. CodeShield aligns the model in the code modality by teaching it to generate honeypot code under GCD. Such code is semantically harmless, so it does not implement the malicious request, and structurally diverse, so it is difficult to suppress through grammar tightening. At the same time, CodeShield still preserves natural-language refusals when natural language is available. Experiments on 10 popular LLMs across 4 benchmarks show that CodeSpear outperforms representative jailbreak baselines and increases the attack success rate by more than 30 percentage points on average. CodeShield also restores safety under CodeSpear while preserving benign utility. Our findings reveal a fundamental risk of GCD and call for greater attention to its potential security implications.
title_zh: 语法约束解码能够越狱大语言模型，使其生成恶意代码。
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）越来越多地被用于代码生成，这引发了对它们可能被滥用来生成恶意代码的担忧。与此同时，语法约束解码（Grammar-Constrained Decoding, GCD）已被广泛采用，通过强制语法有效性来提高LLM生成代码的可靠性。在本文中，我们揭示了一种反直觉的风险：这种面向可靠性的技术本身可能成为一个攻击面。我们提出了一种新的越狱攻击，称为CodeSpear，它利用GCD诱导LLM生成恶意代码。我们的实验表明，仅应用一个良性代码语法约束就能有效越狱LLM。为了解决这一漏洞，我们提出了CodeShield，一种安全对齐方法，即使在攻击者控制的语法约束下也能稳健地保持安全行为。CodeShield通过在代码模态中对模型进行对齐，教会它在GCD下生成蜜罐代码。这种代码在语义上是无害的，因此不会实现恶意请求，同时在结构上是多样化的，因此难以通过语法收紧来抑制。同时，当自然语言可用时，CodeShield仍然保留自然语言的拒绝回应。在4个基准测试中对10个流行LLM进行的实验表明，CodeSpear优于代表性的越狱基线，平均攻击成功率提高了超过30个百分点。CodeShield在保持良性功能的同时也恢复了CodeSpear下的安全性。我们的发现揭示了GCD的基本风险，并呼吁对其潜在的安全影响给予更多关注。

title: TAHOE: Text-to-SQL with Automated Hint Optimization from Experience
authors: Zhiyi Chen, Jie Song, Peng Li
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have democratized database access through Text-to-SQL, but moving from prototypes to production remains difficult. Real deployments must handle strict SQL dialects, massive schemas, and evolving user preferences, while supervised fine-tuning is costly and rigid and agentic test-time scaling is expensive. We present Tahoe, a system that treats prompt optimization as a dynamic data management problem. Tahoe uses an error-driven hint learning pipeline across Development and Deployment to consolidate debugging traces into a structured Hint Bank. Compiler feedback is distilled into reusable Syntax Hints for dialect-specific rules, while execution and user feedback are converted into Semantic Hints for schema- and user-specific logic. Tahoe further introduces a Strategy Layer that models conflicting user intents as competing strategies under shared natural-language triggers, with recency signals and post-learning attribution statistics that summarize empirical success, harm, inertness, and support. At inference time, Tahoe retrieves relevant hints and guides the LLM through Logic Planning followed by SQL Synthesis. We implement and evaluate the development-phase workflow, leaving deployment-time human-feedback updates for future work. On Spider 2.0-Snow, Tahoe substantially improves Text-to-SQL without updating model parameters. On 113 supervised Spider 2.0-Snow-0212 examples using GPT-5.5, Tahoe raises pass rate from 61.95 percent to 79.42 percent and pass-at-4 from 72.57 percent to 87.61 percent, achieves 100 percent Snowflake syntax pass rate, and reduces average compiler-feedback critic rounds from 2.79 to 0.12 per sampled candidate. The same Hint Bank also transfers to weaker backbones, including a 19.7 percentage-point pass-rate gain on Doubao-2.0-lite.
title_zh: TAHOE: 基于经验的自动化提示优化的文本到SQL
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）通过Text-to-SQL实现了数据库访问的民主化，但从原型到生产环境的迁移仍然困难。实际部署必须处理严格的SQL方言、庞大的模式和不断变化的用户偏好，而监督微调成本高昂且僵化，代理测试时扩展（agentic test-time scaling）也非常昂贵。我们提出了Tahoe，一个将提示优化视为动态数据管理问题的系统。Tahoe在开发和部署阶段使用错误驱动的提示学习流水线，将调试跟踪合并为结构化的提示库（Hint Bank）。编译器反馈被提炼为可重用的语法提示（Syntax Hints），用于特定方言的规则；而执行和用户反馈则转换为语义提示（Semantic Hints），用于模式相关和用户特定的逻辑。Tahoe进一步引入了策略层（Strategy Layer），将冲突的用户意图建模为共享自然语言触发条件下的竞争策略，并结合时效性信号和学习后归因统计，总结经验成功、危害、惰性和支持度。在推理时，Tahoe检索相关提示，引导大语言模型先进行逻辑规划（Logic Planning），然后进行SQL生成（SQL Synthesis）。我们实现并评估了开发阶段的工作流，将部署时的人类反馈更新留作未来工作。在Spider 2.0-Snow上，Tahoe在不更新模型参数的情况下显著改进了Text-to-SQL。在113个有监督的Spider 2.0-Snow-0212示例上，使用GPT-5.5，Tahoe将通过率从61.95%提升至79.42%，将pass-at-4（4次尝试通过率）从72.57%提升至87.61%，实现了100%的Snowflake语法通过率，并将每个采样候选的平均编译器反馈批评轮次从2.79降低到0.12。相同的提示库也迁移到了较弱的基座上，包括在Doubao-2.0-lite上获得了19.7个百分点的通过率提升。

title: Agreement in Representation Space for Open-Ended Self-Consistency
authors: Paula Ontalvilla, Gorka Azkune, Aitor Ormazabal
abstract: Self-consistency improves LLM reasoning by sampling multiple outputs and selecting the most consistent answer, but existing formulations largely rely on exact matching and therefore remain limited to tasks with categorical outputs. In this work, we study self-consistency in open-ended generation tasks such as code synthesis and text summarization. We hypothesize that consistency can be understood as a geometric property of the generation space, where semantically compatible generations concentrate in similar regions of representation space. To study this hypothesis, we introduce Embedding-Based Agreement (EBA), a simple training-free operationalization that estimates agreement by clustering sampled generations in embedding space. Through experiments on mathematical reasoning, code generation, and summarization, we show that agreement in representation space provides a robust and scalable signal of self-consistency for open-ended tasks. In particular, EBA consistently outperforms random selection and exhibits more stable scaling behavior than recent selection approaches based on LLM evaluation or uncertainty estimation. We further show that these agreement signals remain stable across model families and embedding spaces, even with native hidden representations. Finally, our analysis shows that the geometric location occupied by sampled generations is strongly correlated with generation quality: generations concentrated near central regions of representation space tend to correspond to more reliable outputs, whereas peripheral generations are substantially less accurate. Overall, our findings support viewing self-consistency as a property of the geometric organization of sampled generations rather than exact symbolic overlap.
title_zh: 开放式自洽的表示空间一致性
abstract_zh: 自我一致性通过采样多个输出并选择最一致的答案来改进LLM推理，但现有方法主要依赖精确匹配，因此仅限于具有分类输出的任务。在这项工作中，我们研究了代码合成和文本摘要等开放式生成任务中的自我一致性。我们假设，一致性可以理解为生成空间的几何属性，其中语义兼容的生成在表示空间的相似区域中聚集。为了验证这一假设，我们引入了基于嵌入的一致性（EBA）——一种简单的无需训练的操作化方法，通过在嵌入空间中对采样生成进行聚类来估计一致性。通过数学推理、代码生成和摘要生成实验，我们表明表示空间中的一致性为开放式任务提供了稳健且可扩展的自我一致性信号。特别是，EBA始终优于随机选择，并且比最近基于LLM评估或不确定性估计的选择方法展现出更稳定的扩展行为。我们进一步表明，这些一致性信号在不同模型家族和嵌入空间（甚至包括原生隐藏表示）中保持稳定。最后，我们的分析显示，采样生成占据的几何位置与生成质量高度相关：集中在表示空间中心区域的生成往往对应更可靠的输出，而边缘生成的准确性则显著较低。总体而言，我们的研究结果支持将自我一致性视为采样生成的几何组织属性，而非精确符号重叠。

title: Exploration Structure in LLM Agents for Multi-File Change Localization
authors: Akeela Darryl Fattha, Kia Ying Chua, Lingxiao Jiang, Laura Wynter
abstract: Software engineering tools increasingly rely on LLM based agents to localize files to change to resolve a software issue. Most AI agents explore repositories linearly, that is, visiting one directory or file per step. We postulate that this is a structural mismatch for changes that span several subsystems. We compare linear sequential exploration against non-linear, domain-scoped parallel agentic exploration. Using SWE Bench Pro as initial benchmark, we focus on ansible as an exemplar. We construct an approach for persistent-session evaluation of GitHub issues anchored at a single base commit. We compare our non-linear domain-agent file traversal system against a base LLM without direct repository access, a single agent Recursive Language Model (RLM) baseline with a persistent Python REPL and an external CLI baseline using Codex 5.5 High. Domain scoped parallel agent spawning with a small Haiku-class model achieves the highest micro F1 among Haiku class models by a large margin. Domain-agents is the second highest behind only the much larger Codex 5.5 High on our own expanded benchmark including over more recent PRs from 2025 and 2026. On the original, curated, 2020 SWE-bench Pro benchmark, a larger Sonnet plain LLM baseline attains higher micro F1 by predicting few files, leading to higher precision, but at significantly lower all gold recall. We also present three additional findings. First, documentation evolution is a latent dependency unresolved by any approach. Second, naive file system access can degrade localization driven by test-file over prediction. Lastly, forced multi-agent consultation does not measurably help and raises token cost substantially.
title_zh: 面向多文件变更定位的LLM智能体探索结构
abstract_zh: 软件工程工具越来越依赖基于大语言模型（LLM）的代理来定位需要修改的源文件，以解决软件问题。大多数AI代理以线性方式探索仓库，即每一步只访问一个目录或文件。我们假设，这种结构对于涉及多个子系统的变更存在不匹配。我们比较了线性顺序探索与非线性的、领域范围的并行代理探索。以SWE Bench Pro为初始基准，我们以Ansible为典型案例。我们构建了一种基于单一基础提交的GitHub问题持久会话评估方法。我们将非线性的领域代理文件遍历系统与以下方法进行对比：无直接仓库访问权限的基础LLM、带有持久Python REPL的单代理递归语言模型（RLM）基线，以及使用Codex 5.5 High的外部命令行基线。使用小型Haiku类模型进行领域范围的并行代理衍生，在Haiku类模型中以显著优势获得了最高的微F1值。在我们自己扩展的基准测试上（包括2025年和2026年的更新近PR），领域代理的微F1仅低于规模更大的Codex 5.5 High，位居第二。在原始精选的2020年SWE-bench Pro基准测试中，较大的Sonnet纯LLM基线通过预测少量文件获得了更高的微F1（即更高精度），但所有黄金召回率显著较低。我们还提出了三项额外发现：首先，文档演化是所有方法都无法解决的潜在依赖；其次，朴素的文件系统访问可能因过度预测测试文件而降低定位效果；最后，强制多代理协作并未带来可衡量的提升，反而大幅增加了令牌成本。

title: Gerrymandering the Warp: Non-Control-Data Attacks on CUDA Collective Decision
authors: Igor Santos-Grueiro
abstract: CUDA collective operations often sit on security decision paths: votes accept batches, reductions aggregate evidence, shuffles select representatives, and barriers order checked state before use. Such decisions depend not only on computed values, but also on which lanes are represented, what evidence they contribute, which lane speaks for the group, and which checked state reaches commit. We identify this participation metadata as decision-making non-control data. We define Collective Semantic Corruption (CSC), a non-control-data attack family in which range-valid masks, predicates, source lanes, descriptors, group labels, or epochs cause a CUDA-conforming collective to authorize a decision over the wrong membership, contribution, role, or validation-to-use state. The kernel reaches the intended collective site and executes the expected primitive; the primitive represents the wrong authority set. We model CSC with a site-local participation-authority contract. A protected collective derives, recomputes, checks, or freezes membership, contribution, role, and temporal state before authorization. We evaluate CSC across NVIDIA CUDA collective primitives, trigger channels, compact workload-style kernels, reduced idiom bridges, and admission-guard harnesses. In a CUDA-defined contract-conformance suite spanning the four authority dimensions, corrupted participation metadata causes a trusted-reference mismatch in 102/102 instances, while hardened variants preserve that reference in 102/102. We report 13 synchronization-sensitive instances separately. We then introduce Collective Integrity Contracts (CIC), a wrapper discipline that binds participation metadata before collective use. For CUDA collective decisions, security depends on both the values computed and the participants represented.
title_zh: 不公正划分Warp：针对CUDA集体决策的非控制数据攻击
abstract_zh: CUDA集体操作常处于安全决策路径之上：投票接受批次、归约聚合证据、洗牌选择代表、以及屏障在使用前对已检查状态进行排序。此类决策不仅依赖于计算得出的数值，还取决于哪些线程通道被代表、它们贡献了什么证据、哪个通道代表线程组发言、以及哪个已检查状态最终被提交。我们将这种参与元数据识别为决策性非控制数据。我们定义了集体语义破坏（CSC）——一类非控制数据攻击家族，其中范围有效的掩码、谓词、源通道、描述符、组标签或时间周期，使得符合CUDA规范的集体操作对错误的成员、贡献、角色或验证-使用状态进行了授权。内核到达了预期的集体操作站点，并执行了预期的原语；然而该原语代表了错误的权威集合。我们通过站点本地的参与-授权契约对CSC进行建模。受保护的集体操作在授权前会推导、重新计算、检查或冻结成员、贡献、角色以及时间状态。我们评估了CSC在NVIDIA CUDA集体操作原语、触发通道、紧凑型工作负载风格内核、归约惯用桥接以及准入防护框架中的表现。在一个涵盖四个权威维度的CUDA定义契约一致性测试套件中，被破坏的参与元数据在102/102个实例中导致了可信参考不匹配，而强化变体在102/102个实例中保留了该参考。我们单独报告了13个对同步敏感的实例。随后，我们引入了集体完整性契约（CIC），这是一种在集体操作使用前绑定参与元数据的包装规范。对于CUDA集体决策，安全性既取决于计算出的数值，也取决于代表的参与者。

title: WarpGuard: Protected-Site Control-Flow Integrity for CUDA SASS Binaries
authors: Igor Santos-Grueiro
abstract: Recent CUDA exploitation work shows that GPU memory bugs can escalate into device-side control-flow corruption, as kernels later consume corrupted return continuations, function pointers, dispatch-table entries, or branch targets. For deployed CUDA binaries, the relevant security boundary is executed NVIDIA SASS, after PTX lowering, inlining, ABI decisions, register allocation, spills, predication, and SIMT execution; source- or PTX-level policies do not capture this boundary. We present WarpGuard, to our knowledge the first protected-site CFI system for CUDA device binaries operating on executed SASS. WarpGuard enforces at protected sites: recovered SASS instructions or sequences that consume control-flow state, provide sufficient binary evidence to derive policy, are checked before release, and fail closed on violation. It authenticates backward-edge continuation state for instrumented returns, validates recoverable forward targets per site, and reports fixed-edge, unsupported, profile-excluded, fallback, and no-surface outcomes outside the protected denominator. On 77 CUDA artifacts, WarpGuard classifies 51,621 SASS control-flow sites, including 1,343 returns and 154 supported forward target-set entries, and records 52.2 million dynamic checks. In representative backward- and forward-edge corruption attacks, native execution reaches attacker-selected behavior, detect-only mode records the expected violation, and enforcement fails closed before releasing the invalid protected transfer. Public-code evidence shows that the same SASS consumption patterns occur in real CUDA systems, including runtime dispatch tables, cuFFT callbacks, generated callable tables, and uploaded device-function pointers. WarpGuard delivers auditable protected-site CFI for CUDA SASS and separates dynamic-instrumentation enforcement from callback-free SASS timing and patch-cache feasibility.
title_zh: WarpGuard：面向CUDA SASS二进制文件的受保护站点控制流完整性
abstract_zh: 最近的CUDA利用研究显示，GPU内存漏洞可能升级为设备端控制流破坏，因为后续内核会消费被破坏的返回续延、函数指针、调度表条目或分支目标。对于已部署的CUDA二进制文件，相关的安全边界是执行后的NVIDIA SASS，经过PTX降级、内联、ABI决策、寄存器分配、溢出、谓词和SIMT执行；源码或PTX级别的策略无法捕获这个边界。据我们所知，WarpGuard是首个针对在已执行SASS上运行的CUDA设备二进制文件的保护点控制流完整性系统。WarpGuard在保护点处强制执行：恢复的SASS指令或序列，这些指令或序列消耗控制流状态，提供足够的二进制证据以推导策略，在释放前进行检查，并在违规时默认失败。它为检测的返回认证后向边续延状态，为每个点验证可恢复的前向目标，并报告受保护分母之外的固定边、不支持、配置文件排除、回退和无表面结果。在77个CUDA工件上，WarpGuard分类了51,621个SASS控制流点，包括1,343个返回和154个受支持的前向目标集条目，并记录了5220万次动态检查。在代表性的后向边和前向边破坏攻击中，原生执行达到攻击者选择的行为，仅检测模式记录预期的违规，在释放无效受保护传输之前，强制执行默认失败。公共代码证据表明，相同的SASS消费模式出现在真实的CUDA系统中，包括运行时调度表、cuFFT回调、生成的可调用表和上传的设备函数指针。WarpGuard为CUDA SASS提供了可审计的保护点控制流完整性，并将动态插桩强制执行与无回调SASS时序和补丁缓存可行性分离。

title: A Fast Locality Simulator for GEMM Design-Space Exploration on Multi-Chiplet GPUs
authors: Euijun Chung, Hyesoon Kim
abstract: Multi-chiplet GPUs split memory into local and remote HBM regions across a silicon interposer, and reducing the remote HBM traffic is crucial for the performance and energy efficiency of multi-chiplet GPUs. For general matrix multiplication (GEMM), the dominant operator in large language models (LLMs), the resulting inter-chiplet traffic depends strongly on kernel choices such as operand layout, CTA traversal order, and data placement, and the optimal strategy to minimize remote accesses is nontrivial. We present a fast, functional, tile-level locality simulator that models CTA scheduling, per-chiplet L2 caches, and local/remote HBM accesses to evaluate a full-size LLM GEMM configuration. Across representative LLM GEMMs, the simulator shows that remote traffic varies by up to 90x across the design space for the same GEMM dimensions. Moreover, using the simulator as feedback, an agentic AI discovers that a 2D block-swizzle CTA traversal reduces remote traffic over the best 1D traversal by up to 5.1x under round-robin placement, identifying CTA traversal order as a first-order, GEMM-dependent design knob for inter-chiplet traffic.
title_zh: 一种用于多芯粒GPU上GEMM设计空间探索的快速局部性模拟器
abstract_zh: 多芯片GPU通过硅中介层将内存划分为本地和远程HBM区域，而减少远程HBM流量对于多芯片GPU的性能和能效至关重要。对于大语言模型（LLM）中的主导算子——通用矩阵乘法（GEMM），产生的芯片间流量强烈依赖于内核选择，例如操作数布局、CTA遍历顺序和数据放置，而最小化远程访问的最优策略并非易事。我们提出了一种快速、功能性的瓦片级局部性模拟器，该模拟器对CTA调度、每个芯片的L2缓存以及本地/远程HBM访问进行建模，以评估全尺寸LLM GEMM配置。在具有代表性的LLM GEMM中，模拟器显示，对于相同GEMM维度，远程流量在设计空间中变化高达90倍。此外，利用该模拟器作为反馈，一个智能体AI发现，在轮询放置下，二维块交织CTA遍历相比最优的一维遍历可将远程流量减少高达5.1倍，从而确定CTA遍历顺序是芯片间流量的一个一阶且依赖GEMM的设计参数。

title: Rule Taxonomy and Evolution in AI IDEs: A Mining and Survey Study
authors: Guangzong Cai, Ruiyin Li, Peng Liang, Zengyang Li, Mojtaba Shahin
abstract: The adoption of AI-powered Integrated Development Environments (AI IDEs) has introduced "Rules" as a novel software artifact, allowing developers to persistently inject project-specific constraints and architectural guidelines into the context of Large Language Models (LLMs). Despite their role in aligning AI behavior with developer intent, the taxonomy, evolution, and practical impact of these rules remain largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we conducted a mixed-methods empirical study on AI IDE rules. By mining 83 open-source projects and extracting 7,310 rules, we established a comprehensive taxonomy comprising 5 primary and 25 secondary categories. We then triangulated these artifacts with survey responses from 99 practitioners. Our analysis identified a contrast between developer priorities and actual configurations: while practitioners rate architectural constraints as highly important, rule files in repositories primarily consist of low-level workflow and code formatting constraints. Furthermore, our analysis of 1,540 rule evolution events revealed that rules are updated frequently. Repository data further indicate that rule evolution is primarily driven by constructive context expansions (29.17%) and enrichments (26.59%). In contrast, surveyed developers reported modifying rules primarily to correct AI errors (77.78%), typically by adding new negative constraints rather than editing existing ones. Finally, an artifact compliance assessment of 160 rule evolution events revealed that updating rules significantly improves the adherence of software artifacts, with the average artifact compliance rate increasing by 22.99% (from 49.14% to 72.13%) following an update. Our study provides empirical insights that can help developers optimize prompting strategies and guide tool builders in designing automated conflict-detection and context-management mechanisms for AI IDEs.
title_zh: 人工智能集成开发环境中的规则分类与演化：一项挖掘与调查研究
abstract_zh: 采用AI驱动的集成开发环境（AI IDE）引入了“规则”这一新型软件产物，使开发者能够将项目特定的约束与架构指南持久地注入到大型语言模型（LLM）的上下文中。尽管这些规则在协调AI行为与开发者意图方面发挥着关键作用，但其分类体系、演化规律及实际影响尚未得到充分探索。为此，我们开展了一项混合方法的实证研究。通过挖掘83个开源项目并提取7310条规则，我们构建了一个涵盖5个主要类别和25个次级类别的综合分类体系。随后，我们将这些规则产物与99位从业者的调查反馈进行三角验证。分析发现，开发者的优先级与实际配置之间存在矛盾：尽管从业者认为架构约束至关重要，但代码仓库中的规则文件主要包含底层工作流和代码格式约束。此外，我们对1540次规则演化事件的分析表明，规则更新频繁。仓库数据进一步显示，规则演化主要由建设性上下文扩展（29.17%）和内容丰富化（26.59%）驱动。相比之下，受访开发者报告修改规则的主要目的是纠正AI错误（77.78%），通常通过新增否定性约束而非编辑现有约束实现。最后，对160次规则演化事件的产物合规性评估显示，更新规则显著提升了软件产物的依从性，更新后产物平均合规率从49.14%提升至72.13%，增幅达22.99%。本研究为开发者优化提示策略提供了实证依据，并为工具构建者在AI IDE中设计自动化冲突检测与上下文管理机制提供了指导。

title: Computer Aided Design Tool for Multiple-Impedance Matching Network
authors: Ahmad Eldahshan, Hesham Nabil, Ayman Eltager
abstract: This paper introduces an automatic and systematic method to design a generic multiple-impedance matching-network using a novel proposed computer aided design (CAD) tool. The task of this tool is to achieve conjugate matching for multiple source-load impedances at arbitrary frequencies. Maximum gain within the acceptable user-defined design parameters is achieved. Design automation feature provided by the tool relies on the built-in multi-objective optimization algorithms using MATLAB software. This tool provides the designer with the ability to dictate various design parameters such as source/load complex impedances, frequencies of operation, bandwidths, and VSWR to be achieved simultaneously. Starting with suggesting applicable circuit topologies, the proposed CAD tool provides the acceptable operating ranges for each component, and the corresponding design parameters. The interactive features included give the designer extra degree of freedom to study the impact of each component on the whole network performance. To demonstrate the interesting features of the proposed CAD tool, a wide-band antenna is introduced as a practical case study to be matched with 50-Ω load. Based on the predefined constraints, the tool provides many solutions to solve the matching problem with the user constraints.
title_zh: 多阻抗匹配网络的计算机辅助设计工具
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种利用新型计算机辅助设计（CAD）工具自动且系统地设计通用多阻抗匹配网络的方法。该工具的任务是在任意频率下实现多个源-负载阻抗的共轭匹配，并在用户定义的可接受设计参数范围内获得最大增益。该工具提供的设计自动化功能依赖于基于MATLAB软件的内置多目标优化算法。该工具使设计人员能够同时指定各种设计参数，例如源/负载复阻抗、工作频率、带宽以及所需的电压驻波比（VSWR）。从建议适用的电路拓扑开始，所提出的CAD工具为每个元件提供可接受的工作范围及相应的设计参数。其包含的交互功能为设计人员提供了额外的自由度，以研究每个元件对整个网络性能的影响。为展示所提出的CAD工具的有趣特性，本文引入了一个宽带天线作为实际案例，以将其与50Ω负载匹配。基于预定义的约束条件，该工具提供了多种解决方案，以在用户约束下解决匹配问题。

title: Estimating Technical Debt with Machine Learning: Leveraging Code Complexity and Developer Interactions
authors: Md Abu Sufian, Estiyak Rubaiat, Md Daud Hossain Supto, Nabajit Dey, Tajmun Nahar Tisha, Shafiqul Islam Nayem
publish: 2026 IEEE 2nd International Conference on Quantum Photonics, Artificial Intelligence &amp; Networking (QPAIN)
abstract: Estimating technical debt (TD) is crucial in managing large-scale software projects. This study introduces a machine learning-based framework for TD estimation in opensource Java projects, integrating code complexity metrics and developer interaction features. Using a dataset of 55 million Java files from 100,000 GitHub repositories, we apply XGBoost, LSTM, and Informer models for multi-horizon TD forecasting. SHAP (SHapley Additive Explanations) is utilized for interpretability, revealing key TD drivers such as cyclomatic complexity, commit frequency, and review cycle time. The results demonstrate that the Informer model outperforms others, achieving an <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$R^{2}$</tex> of 0.9250 and an MAE of 3.60, particularly excelling in long-term forecasting. This model's ability to predict TD with high accuracy makes it suitable for integration into CI/CD pipelines, ensuring proactive TD management. The proposed framework provides actionable insights for developers, enabling them to prioritize remediation based on the most significant factors contributing to TD. This research offers a scalable, data-driven solution for software maintenance, contributing to improved software quality and sustainability.
title_zh: 利用机器学习估算技术债务：借助代码复杂度与开发者交互
abstract_zh: 估算技术债务（TD）对于管理大规模软件项目至关重要。本研究提出了一种基于机器学习的开源Java项目技术债务估算框架，该框架整合了代码复杂度指标与开发者交互特征。利用源自10万个GitHub仓库的5500万份Java文件数据集，我们采用XGBoost、LSTM和Informer模型进行多时间跨度的技术债务预测。通过SHAP（SHapley Additive Explanations）方法实现可解释性分析，揭示了圈复杂度、提交频率和审查周期等关键技术债务驱动因素。结果表明，Informer模型表现最优，其决定系数（<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$R^{2}$</tex>）达0.9250，平均绝对误差（MAE）为3.60，尤其在长期预测方面具有显著优势。该模型对技术债务的高精度预测能力使其适用于集成至CI/CD流水线，确保技术债务的主动管理。本研究提出的框架为开发者提供了可操作的建议，使其能够根据导致技术债务的最关键因素优先制定修复方案。这项研究为软件维护提供了可扩展的数据驱动解决方案，有助于提升软件质量与可持续性。

title: DiffRouter: A Differentiable Routing Framework for UltraScale FPGAs
authors: Xiaohan Gao, Zhili Xiong, Yusu Wang, David Z. Pan
publish: 2026 IEEE 34th Annual International Symposium on Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (FCCM)
abstract: Routing has become a major bottleneck in large-scale FPGA design flows, where traditional routers rely on sequential net-by-net processing and rip-up-reroute heuristics. This inherent sequentialism limits parallelism, leads to suboptimal utilization of routing resources, and significantly increases runtime on modern FPGAs. This paper introduces DiffRouter, the first differentiable, gradient-based FPGA routing framework with GPU acceleration. By lifting routing into a continuous optimization space, DiffRouter enables highly concurrent routing and improved global optimality before projecting solutions back onto the discrete fabric. The framework consists of three key stages: (1) Resource-pruned preprocessing, which extracts compact routing variables per net to reduce memory footprint and problem complexity; (2) Differentiable global routing via gradient descent, which formulates routing as a Lagrangian-relaxed optimization that minimizes wirelength while iteratively enforcing connectivity and congestion constraints as relaxed terms; and (3) Postprocessing, which maps the continuous wire distributions to a valid UltraScale routing solution and completes solutions by detailed routing. Experiments on the FPGA 2024 Routing Contest benchmarks show that DiffRouter outperforms state-of-the-art parallel routers, achieving over 5× speedup over RWRoute and 2× over Vivado, and running 18% faster than the state-of-the-art academic FPGA router Potter while delivering competitive critical path wirelength.
title_zh: DiffRouter：面向UltraScale FPGA的可微分路由框架
abstract_zh: 布线已成为大规模FPGA设计流程中的主要瓶颈，传统布线器依赖顺序化的线网逐条处理及拆线重布启发式方法。这种固有的顺序性限制了并行化，导致布线资源利用次优，并显著增加了现代FPGA的运行时间。本文提出DiffRouter——首个可微分、基于梯度的FPGA布线框架，支持GPU加速。通过将布线问题提升至连续优化空间，DiffRouter实现了高度并发的布线，并在将解投影回离散结构前提升了全局最优性。该框架包含三个关键阶段：(1)资源修剪预处理，为每条线网提取紧凑的布线变量，以降低内存占用和问题复杂度；(2)基于梯度下降的可微分全局布线，将布线问题表述为拉格朗日松弛优化，通过最小化线长并迭代执行连通性与拥塞约束（作为松弛项）来求解；以及(3)后处理，将连续线网分布映射为有效的UltraScale布线方案，并通过详细布线完成求解。在FPGA 2024布线竞赛基准测试上的实验表明，DiffRouter优于最先进的并行布线器：相比RWRoute实现超过5倍加速，相比Vivado实现2倍加速，并且比最先进的学术FPGA布线器Potter运行速度快18%，同时保持了有竞争力的关键路径线长。

title: Enhancing Code Generation Using Instruction-Tuned Transformer Models for Multi-Language Software Development
authors: A. Sathiyavathi, C. Gethara Gowri, R. Sundar, J. Arockia Theo, L. Poornimadevi, Suberiya Begum S
publish: 2026 IEEE 2nd International Conference on Quantum Photonics, Artificial Intelligence &amp; Networking (QPAIN)
abstract: The rapid growth of multi-language software development has increased the demand for intelligent systems capable of generating accurate and reliable source code from natural language instructions. Transformer-based models have shown significant potential in automated code generation; however, their effectiveness is often limited by inadequate alignment with user intent and challenges in cross-language generalization. This research investigates the enhancement of code generation using instruction-tuned transformer models to improve adaptability across multiple programming languages. A structured experimental methodology is adopted, incorporating a pretrained transformer baseline, instruction tuning, and systematic evaluation supported by a built-in benchmark dataset. Exploratory data analysis and visualization techniques are employed to understand data characteristics and support reliable interpretation of results. The findings demonstrate that instruction tuning improves instruction adherence, code consistency, and generalization capability in multi-language scenarios. The proposed framework provides a reproducible and scalable foundation for advancing automated code generation systems in modern software development environments.
title_zh: 利用指令调优的Transformer模型增强多语言软件开发中的代码生成
abstract_zh: 多语言软件开发的快速增长，提升了对能够从自然语言指令中生成准确可靠源代码的智能系统的需求。基于Transformer的模型在自动化代码生成方面展现出显著潜力，然而，其有效性往往受限于与用户意图的对齐不足以及跨语言泛化的挑战。本研究探讨如何利用指令微调后的Transformer模型提升代码生成能力，以增强其对多种编程语言的适应性。采用结构化实验方法，包括预训练Transformer基线模型、指令微调，以及通过内置基准数据集进行的系统性评估。借助探索性数据分析和可视化技术，理解数据特征并支持对结果的可靠解读。研究结果表明，指令微调能够提升指令遵循度、代码一致性以及多语言场景下的泛化能力。所提出的框架为现代软件开发环境中推进自动化代码生成系统提供了可复现且可扩展的基础。

title: PathSteiner: Improving PathFinder with Quasi-Optimal Steiner-Tree Initialization
authors: Shashwat Shrivastava, Luka Kurešević, Alexandros Poupakis, Chirag Ravishankar, Dinesh Gaitonde, Stefan Nikolić, Mirjana Stojilović
publish: 2026 IEEE 34th Annual International Symposium on Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (FCCM)
abstract: FPGA routing has been studied for a few decades due to its critical role in determining both the quality of results and compilation time. Recent work has shown that constructing more resource-efficient routing trees can improve both runtime and wirelength. Yet, the proposed approach of constructing multiple routing trees per net via random sink orderings—within the PathFinder routing paradigm—and selecting the best candidate becomes increasingly impractical as net fanout grows. This limitation arises because the space of possible sink orderings grows super-exponentially, allowing only a small fraction of it to be explored in practice. Moreover, even exhaustive enumeration of all sink permutations for low-fanout nets does not necessarily yield an optimal routing tree. To address these limitations, we initialize routing with quasi-optimal rectilinear Steiner trees to better cover the solution space across net fanouts. Our results show that, because these trees are only weakly congestion-aware, the final routed wirelength gains are real but fall short of the wirelength advantage implied by the seeded trees. How much of the gain remains depends on how effectively PathFinder resolves congestion while staying close to the seed. We report an average 6% improvement in wirelength, along with an 8× reduction in runtime on the most congested benchmark, which otherwise takes more than half a day to route.
title_zh: PathSteiner: 使用准最优斯坦纳树初始化改进PathFinder
abstract_zh: 由于FPGA路由在决定质量结果和编译时间上起着关键作用，相关研究已持续数十年。近期研究表明，构建资源效率更高的路由树可同时改善运行时间和线长。然而，在PathFinder路由范式下，通过随机排列汇点顺序为每个线网构建多个路由树并选择最佳候选的方法，随着线网扇出增加而愈发不切实际。产生这一局限的原因在于，可能的汇点顺序空间呈超指数增长，实际中仅能探索其中极小一部分。此外，即使对于低扇出线网穷举所有汇点排列，也未必能得到最优路由树。为解决这些问题，我们采用准最优直线斯坦纳树初始化路由，以更好地覆盖不同扇出线网的解空间。结果表明，由于这些树对拥塞的感知较弱，最终路由线长虽确有改善，但未能达到初始树预期的线长优势。究竟保留多少增益，取决于PathFinder在靠近初始树的同时解决拥塞的能力。我们报告显示，在最拥塞的基准测试中，线长平均改善6%，运行时间减少8倍——该测试原本需要半天以上才能完成路由。

title: Federated and Privacy-Preserving Cross-Project Defect Prediction with Heterogeneous Features_supp1-3692541.pdf
authors: Meetesh Nevendra
abstract: Organizations are often reluctant to share defectlabeled source code because of privacy and intellectual property concerns, yet effective cross-project defect prediction (CPDP) depends on learning from diverse projects. This paper introduces FedCPDP, a federated and privacy-preserving framework that enables collaborative defect prediction without exchanging raw project data and without requiring a common feature schema. The approach employs feature hashing to unify heterogeneous metric spaces, integrates federated proximal optimization with representation alignment to mitigate distribution shift, and incorporates differential privacy mechanisms to safeguard sensitive updates. To further enhance robustness, FedCPDP explores adaptive server aggregation strategies (attention and graphbased) and seed ensembling, while addressing class imbalance through focal loss and threshold optimization. The framework is evaluated on thirty benchmark datasets across five CPDP families under leave-one-project-out validation, using both threshold-free and effort-aware metrics. Results show that FedCPDP improves F1 by up to 10-15% over FedAvg and 6-8% over FedDPI, while achieving 8-10% higher Popt under effort-aware evaluation. These gains are statistically significant, confirming that FedCPDP consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods while uniquely supporting heterogeneous features and offering explicit privacy guarantees. These findings establish FedCPDP as a practical step toward enabling secure and deployable defect prediction in multiorganizational settings.
title_zh: 异构特征下的联邦与隐私保护跨项目缺陷预测_补充材料1-3692541.pdf
abstract_zh: 由于隐私和知识产权方面的顾虑，组织往往不愿共享带有缺陷标注的源代码，然而有效的跨项目缺陷预测（CPDP）依赖于从不同项目中学习。本文提出了FedCPDP，一种联邦式且保护隐私的框架，能够在无需交换原始项目数据、也无需通用特征模式的前提下实现协作式缺陷预测。该方法采用特征哈希统一异构度量空间，将联邦近端优化与表示对齐相结合以缓解分布偏移，并融入差分隐私机制来保护敏感更新。为进一步提升鲁棒性，FedCPDP探索了自适应服务器聚合策略（基于注意力与图的方法）和种子集成，并通过焦点损失与阈值优化应对类别不平衡问题。该框架在三十个基准数据集上，采用留一项目交叉验证方法，在无视阈值与考虑工作量的评估指标下进行了评估。结果表明，相比FedAvg和FedDPI，FedCPDP的F1值分别提升了10-15%和6-8%，在考虑工作量的评估中P_opt提升了8-10%。这些提升具有统计显著性，证实FedCPDP在持续优于现有最优方法的同时，独特地支持异构特征并提供明确隐私保障。这些发现使FedCPDP成为在跨组织环境中实现安全、可部署的缺陷预测的实用步骤。

title: Combining HLS and Computation Coding for Balanced Matrix-Vector Engines on FPGA
authors: Sayanti Pal, Alexander Lehnert, Marc Reichenbach
publish: 2026 IEEE 34th Annual International Symposium on Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (FCCM)
abstract: Limited number of DSP48 blocks versus abundant LUTs constrains the throughput of FPGA-based constant matrix–vector multiplications (MVM). We exploit Linear Computation-Coding (LCC) to build multiplier-less, deeply pipelined adder graphs on LUTs and combine it with a DSP-mapped HLS datapath via a pragmatic column-split partition. This hybrid mapping achieves balanced DSP and LUT utilization without sacrificing throughput, resulting in a scalable, high-performance MVM on FPGAs.
title_zh: 结合HLS与计算编码的FPGA上均衡矩阵向量引擎
abstract_zh: 有限数量的DSP48块与丰富的LUT相比，制约了基于FPGA的常数矩阵-向量乘法（MVM）的吞吐量。我们利用线性计算编码（LCC）在LUT上构建无乘法器、深度流水化的加法器图，并通过一种实用的列分割划分策略，将其与DSP映射的HLS数据路径相结合。这种混合映射实现了DSP和LUT的均衡利用，而不牺牲吞吐量，从而在FPGA上实现了可扩展的高性能MVM。

title: Minimization of Reversible Logic Circuits Using A* with Lookahead
authors: Hyunsu Choi, Takashi Hirayama, Katsuhisa Yamanaka
publish: 2026 IEEE 56th International Symposium on Multiple-Valued Logic (ISMVL)
abstract: This paper presents an approach for minimizing reversible logic circuits composed of Toffoli gates, employing the A* with Lookahead (AL*) algorithm. Previous A*-based optimization methods have suffered from excessive memory requirements, which limit the size of circuits that can be handled. To overcome this issue, we employ AL*, an algorithm that incorporates the advantages of depth-first search (DFS) into A*. By predicting the expansion priority of each node through a DFS-based lookahead, the proposed method achieves a significant reduction in memory usage. Consequently, our approach optimizes larger circuits that previous A* methods could not handle due to memory overflow, and we present comparative results in this paper.
title_zh: 使用前瞻A*的可逆逻辑电路最小化
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种最小化由Toffoli门组成的可逆逻辑电路的方法，采用带前瞻的A*（AL*）算法。以往的基于A*的优化方法存在内存需求过大的问题，限制了可处理电路的规模。为解决此问题，我们引入了AL*算法，该算法将深度优先搜索（DFS）的优势融入A*中。通过基于DFS的前瞻预测来估计每个节点的扩展优先级，所提方法显著降低了内存使用。因此，我们的方法能够优化因内存溢出而无法被以往A*方法处理的较大规模电路，并在本文中提供了对比结果。

title: Learn to Generate Complementary March Tests
authors: Ruiqi Zhu, Houjun Wang, Chongtao Guo, Yindong Xiao, Zhijian Dai, Rui Wu, Wanyu Yang, Geoffrey Ye Li
publish: IEEE Transactions on Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) Systems
abstract: March tests require balancing fault coverage (FC) and test length in embedded memory testing. This brief proposes a novel reinforcement-learning (RL)-based framework that learns optimal March tests by exploiting undetected fault statistics. First, we analyze March tests using a scalable state-tuple-based fault analyzer. Then, we formulate March test generation as a problem to maximize expected FC (EFC) under budget limits. By modeling this as a Markov decision process (MDP), we leverage deep Q-learning to find the optimal operation sequences in March tests, with rewards derived from the proposed fault analyzer. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework generates complementary March tests achieving complete residual FC across a broader range of fault models than the existing methods, with generation efficiency significantly improved through fault analysis completing in milliseconds.
title_zh: 学习生成互补March测试
abstract_zh: 在嵌入式存储器测试中，March测试需要在故障覆盖率（FC）和测试长度之间取得平衡。本文提出了一种新颖的基于强化学习（RL）的框架，通过利用未检测故障的统计信息来学习最优的March测试。首先，我们使用一种可扩展的基于状态元组的故障分析器来分析March测试。然后，我们将March测试生成问题表述为在预算限制下最大化期望FC（EFC）的问题。通过将其建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），我们利用深度Q学习来寻找March测试中的最优操作序列，其中奖励来源于所提出的故障分析器。实验结果表明，我们的框架生成了互补的March测试，在比现有方法更广泛的故障模型上实现了完全剩余故障覆盖率，并且通过毫秒级完成的故障分析，显著提高了生成效率。

title: From Acceleration to Accelerating Acceleration: Applications and Tools for Democratizing Hardware Design
authors: Rishov Sarkar, Cong Callie Hao
publish: 2026 IEEE 34th Annual International Symposium on Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (FCCM)
abstract: High-level synthesis allows users to express hardware designs in terms of software languages, raising the level of abstraction. However, most designers still prefer writing low-level RTL code. We present two classes of research works aiming to improve the appeal of HLS: (1) accelerators to showcase the power of HLS for ML applications, and (2) tools to improve the HLS developer experience.
title_zh: 从加速到加速之加速：硬件设计民主化的应用与工具
abstract_zh: 高层次综合允许用户使用软件语言表达硬件设计，从而提升了抽象层次。然而，大多数设计者仍倾向于编写低层次的RTL代码。我们介绍了两类旨在提升HLS吸引力的研究工作：（1）通过加速器展示HLS在机器学习应用中的强大能力；（2）通过工具改善HLS开发者的体验。

title: SPAC: Automating FPGA-based Network Switches with Protocol Adaptive Customization
authors: Guoyu Li, Yang Cao, Lucas H L Ng, Alexander Charlton, Qianzhou Wang, Will Punter, Philippos Papaphilippou, Ce Guo, Hongxiang Fan, Wayne Luk, Saman Amarasinghe, Ajay Brahmakshatriya
publish: 2026 IEEE 34th Annual International Symposium on Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (FCCM)
abstract: With network requirements diverging across emerging applications, latency-critical services demand minimal logic delay, while hyperscale training and collectives require sustained line-rate throughput for synchronized bulk transfers. This divergence creates an urgent need for custom network switches tailored to specialized protocols and application-specific traffic patterns. This paper presents SPAC (Switch and Protocol Adaptive Customization), a novel approach that automates the generation of FPGA-based network switches co-optimized for custom protocols and application-specific traffic patterns. SPAC introduces a unified workflow with a domain-specific language (DSL) for protocol-architecture co-design, a library of modular HLS-based adaptive switch components, and a trace-aware Design Space Exploration (DSE) engine. By providing a multi-fidelity simulation stack, SPAC enables rapid identification of Pareto-optimal designs prior to deployment. We demonstrate the efficacy of the domain-specific adaptation of SPAC across a spectrum of real-world scenarios, spanning from latency-sensitive sensor and HFT networks to hyperscale datacenter fabrics. Experimental results show that by tailoring the micro-architecture and protocol to the specific workload, SPAC-generated designs reduce LUT and BRAM usage by 55% and 53%, respectively. Compared to fixed-architecture counterparts, SPAC delivers latency reductions ranging from 7.8% to 38.4% across various tasks while maintaining adequate resource consumption and packet drop rate. <sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>
title_zh: SPAC：通过协议自适应定制自动化基于FPGA的网络交换机
abstract_zh: 随着新兴应用对网络需求的差异日益增大，延迟敏感服务要求最小化逻辑延迟，而超大规模训练及集合通信则需要持续线速吞吐以支持同步批量传输。这种差异性催生了对定制网络交换机的迫切需求，这些交换机需针对专用协议和特定应用流量模式进行优化。本文提出了SPAC（交换机与协议自适应定制化）方法，这是一种自动生成基于FPGA的网络交换机的新方案，可实现自定义协议与应用特定流量模式的协同优化。SPAC引入统一工作流，包含用于协议架构协同设计的领域特定语言（DSL）、基于HLS的模块化自适应交换机组件库，以及支持轨迹感知的设计空间探索（DSE）引擎。通过提供多保真度仿真堆栈，SPAC能够在部署前快速识别帕累托最优设计。我们在一系列真实场景中验证了SPAC的领域特定适配效果，涵盖延迟敏感的传感器网络、高频交易网络（HFT）以及超大规模数据中心架构。实验结果表明，通过针对特定工作负载定制微架构和协议，SPAC生成的方案分别将查找表（LUT）和块随机存取存储器（BRAM）使用量降低了55%和53%。与固定架构方案相比，SPAC在各种任务中实现了7.8%至38.4%的延迟降低，同时保持了可接受的资源占用和丢包率。<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>

title: Chariot: Compiler-Aware Heterogeneous Graph Representation Learning for Automated HLS Optimization
authors: Yanlong Huang, Jierui Liu, Yuhan She, Rongliang Fu, Tsung-Yi Ho, Hong Yan, Ray C.C. Cheung
publish: 2026 IEEE 34th Annual International Symposium on Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (FCCM)
abstract: High-level synthesis (HLS) design space exploration (DSE) aims to find Pareto-optimal designs but is hindered by slow synthesis evaluations. Existing graph neural network (GNN) surrogates struggle with homogeneous-style graph representations (causing signal over-squashing) and imprecise source-level heuristics for pragma mapping. We propose Chariot, an automated HLS optimization framework. Chariot leverages LLVM-based static analysis for high-fidelity Use-Def chain tracking, modeling HLS designs as semantic-rich heterogeneous graphs that explicitly map directives to true hardware targets. Our framework achieves state-of-the-art QoR prediction, identifying Pareto-optimal solutions with drastically reduced ranking regret while delivering orders-of-magnitude DSE speedup.
title_zh: Chariot：面向自动HLS优化的编译器感知异构图表征学习
abstract_zh: 高级综合（HLS）设计空间探索（DSE）旨在寻找帕累托最优设计，但受限于缓慢的综合评估。现有的图神经网络（GNN）代理面临同构图表示（导致信号过度压缩）以及用于指令映射的不精确源代码级启发式方法等问题。我们提出了Chariot，一种自动化HLS优化框架。Chariot利用基于LLVM的静态分析实现高保真度的使用-定义链追踪，将HLS设计建模为富含语义的异构图，明确地将指令映射到真实硬件目标。我们的框架实现了最先进的QoR预测，在显著降低排序遗憾的同时识别帕累托最优解决方案，并实现了数量级的DSE加速。

title: RLDALS: Reinforcement Learning-Guided Domain-Specific Language Model Framework for Approximate Logic Synthesis
authors: Weichuan Zuo, Jienan Chen, Weiqiang Liu, Weikang Qian
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: Approximate computing offers a promising path toward energy- and area-efficient hardware, yet existing design methods often lack generality and global optimization capability. To address these issues, we present RLDALS, a Reinforcement Learning-Guided Domain-Specific Language Model Framework for Approximate Logic Synthesis. By encoding circuit structures as textual sequences, RLDALS reformulates logic approximation as a language-understandable task, enabling semantic knowledge transfer from natural language to electronic design automation. A customized circuit tokenizer embeds structural information into the textual domain, effectively handling dynamic-node variations that challenge graph-based approaches. Reinforcement learning further guides efficient exploration beyond greedy local optima. Moreover, a compensation mechanism is developed to flexibly adapt to diverse error scenarios with negligible hardware overhead, mitigating accuracy loss while preserving hardware gains. Experimental results show that RLDALS achieves an average of 45.9% area reduction with negligible performance loss and simultaneously improves both signal-to-noise ratio and area efficiency on DSP benchmarks, demonstrating strong generality and effectiveness in approximate logic synthesis.
title_zh: RLDALS：强化学习引导的领域特定语言模型框架，用于近似逻辑综合
abstract_zh: 近似计算为实现高能效、面积高效硬件提供了一条有前景的路径，然而现有设计方法往往缺乏通用性和全局优化能力。为解决这些问题，我们提出RLDALS——一种面向近似逻辑综合的强化学习引导的领域特定语言模型框架。通过将电路结构编码为文本序列，RLDALS将逻辑近似重构为一种语言可理解的任务，实现了从自然语言到电子设计自动化的语义知识迁移。定制化的电路分词器将结构信息嵌入文本域，有效处理了基于图的方法难以应对的动态节点变化。强化学习进一步引导高效探索，避免了贪婪局部最优的局限。此外，我们设计了一种补偿机制，能够灵活适应多种误差场景，且硬件开销可忽略不计，在保留硬件增益的同时减轻精度损失。实验结果表明，RLDALS在数字信号处理基准测试中平均减少45.9%的面积，性能损失可忽略不计，同时信噪比和面积效率均得到提升，展现了在近似逻辑综合中的强通用性和有效性。
